response.justification: Bogdan has the raw years of experience and genuine breadth across web, embedded, and infrastructure, plus a currently active role touching AI-agent tooling. However, the role is a director-level IC requiring recognized AI expertise, strategic advisory credibility, and the ability to influence customers and partners on cloud/AI adoption at scale — none of which the resume demonstrates. His AI exposure is very recent (current role only) and implementation-focused rather than strategic, and there is no evidence of the kind of influence, platform thinking, or industry recognition the position demands.
strengths: 15+ years of hands-on engineering across diverse stacks and domains satisfies the minimum tenure requirement
Active involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling in current role shows genuine, timely engagement with the space
Founder experience (GISCollective) and community teaching (workshops, FOSS4G talk) signal entrepreneurial and knowledge-sharing instincts the role values
concerns: No advanced degree and no domain-specific AI credentials; formal background is a BS in CS and a fine arts degree, well below the preferred Master's/PhD in AI
Career arc is consistently individual-contributor engineering execution, with no demonstrated strategic advisory, thought-leadership, or director-level scope
AI work is shallow in the resume — one bullet in the most recent role — with no shipped AI products, published research, or recognized standing in the AI community

key_factors.factor: Breadth of engineering experience across domains
